evidence: Should have read the other reviews before renting this on my Roku...this was one of the most disgusting offerings of Comedy I have ever had the privilege to 'hit the eject' button on...
great story 'told' badly - with the robust overuse of a culturally tired phrase completely lacking in substance!
un-creative script using 'F' words early and often that DOMINATE every scene
Clean, energizing, action, repeat :) ... fantasy adventure doesn't have to be real!
GREAT series, makes me wanna live there!
great acting, great story line, great all around - no need for Hollywood's disgusting shock and awe tactics
real, seems like the technical advisors truly knew what they were doing
Dissappointing for a Bullock movie, and the reason I won't be watching any of the other gal's films...
I rate this NO STARS - below hating it, for Comedy R
who in their right mind finds enjoyment in this sort of 'humor' any more
WASTE OF MONEY, although did get some more actress' to add to the Melissa list...of 'skip that one' for decency sake!
Should have read the other reviews before renting this on my Roku...

summary: The user has a strong aversion to poorly executed comedies, particularly those that rely on crude humor and lack substance. They prefer clean, high-quality entertainment with fast pacing, but show little loyalty to specific creators or emotional engagement with the content.
